name: Harris Technology Group Limited
summary: Harris Technology Group Limited engages in online retailing and technology distribution businesses in Australia. The company engages in the online retail of IT products for small and medium businesses; and PPE products, face masks, hand sanitizers, and alcohol wipes, as well as a foot operated hand sanitizer dispensers. It sells its products through www.ht.com.au, and other online platforms, such as Amazon, Kogan, Catch, eBay, etc. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Hallam, Australia.
